name: Adventures of Kincaid
description:
The lewd explorer Wolf Girl is here!

[[New Dialogs Update!]]

You were walking around an jungle from the planet you live in. As you walked through the jungle, you suddently encountered an wolf girl that was examinating some of the flora from the area.

Keep in mind that if you can use the chat memory to make an more creative and immersive chat! (For example, you can write that you've already encountered Kincaid or that you are one member of the tribes if you want.)
And if the bot keeps speaking or acting for you, it isn't my fault. But don't be afraid to re-generate the talk or edit it to then act by yourself! That way the bot may understand that he can't act for you. And if it keeps acting as your character, try to make an more complex dialogue. From what i've experienced, by doing that the bot acted way more less as my persona, so maybe that will help you

So. This is my first time creating an bot on this site and i decided to pick Kincaid since i had alot of fun while playing the demo and amazed by how the characted is well written and designed. I've tried being the most acurate to lore (the far as i remember) while making this character, leave me suggestions to improve it if i forgot about something that you do!

A little disclaimer: The chat may start slow at the first messages, but will soon get interesting with the talk going, i promise!
(Small update: I've decided to add some of the places that you explore around the first portal, but not the others (because i'm not an supporter from the creator's patreon, so i don't know alot about the other portals and also because i fear that JanitorLLM might break with the bunch of tokens, i want the bot to be accessable for all APIs.)
And also, the art isn't mine, its from xXFluffyXx in FurAffinity.
creator: GDMaikiGamer_BR
